projects.name: langchain4j
projects.description: LangChain4j is an idiomatic, open-source Java library for building LLM-powered applications on the JVM. It offers a unified API over popular LLM providers and vector stores, and makes implementing tool calling (including MCP support), agents and RAG easy. It integrates seamlessly with enterprise Java frameworks like Quarkus and Spring Boot.

projects.name: CATC-TEMPLATES
projects.description: This repository provides examples and guidance for using Catalyst Center, an intelligent automation and assurance platform for campus networks. It covers various aspects of network automation, including Plug and Play (PnP) workflows, onboarding and day-N templates, and the use of Velocity and Jinja2 scripting languages.
